data.title: SUN's 50th repurchase and destruction phase completed.
data.description: According to the official announcement, the 50th round of SUN token buyback and burn has been completed. From November 27, 2025 to April 25, 2026 (Singapore time), a total of 18,835,780.1486 SUN tokens were bought back and burned, and have been transferred to the black hole address. Since December 15, 2021, the cumulative total burned has reached 669,522,160.92 tokens, of which 374,520,754.74 were burned through SunSwap V2, 285,879,914.81 through SunPump, and 9,121,491.37 through SunX. SUN continues its deflationary trend, further strengthening its token economic model.

data.title: Sources: Iranian Foreign Minister to return to Islamabad on Sunday
data.description: According to Saudi Arabia's Al Arabiya TV, Pakistani sources revealed that Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi will return to Islamabad on Sunday. This comes after New Delhi Television reported that sources indicated the second round of Iran-US talks was scheduled for April 27. (Jinshi)

data.title: Polymarket Predicts 52% Chance of U.S.-Iran Diplomatic Meeting by April 30
data.description:
Polymarket data indicates a 52% probability of a diplomatic meeting between the U.S. and Iran occurring by April 30, marking a 6% increase in a short period. According to Odaily, New Delhi Television reports that sources have stated the second round of talks between Iran and the United States is scheduled for April 27.

Under the market rules, if U.S. and Iranian representatives hold an official diplomatic meeting by 11:59 PM Eastern Time on April 30, the market will conclude with a 'yes' outcome. The definition of a diplomatic meeting includes formal meetings attended by authorized representatives in an official capacity, including indirect face-to-face meetings through mediators, but excludes brief greetings or encounters not intended for diplomatic purposes. The meeting must be face-to-face and recognized by the government or credible media reports.

data.title: Sources: The second round of Iran-US talks is scheduled for April 27.
data.description: According to NDTV: Sources say the second round of Iran-US talks is scheduled for April 27. (Jinshi)

data.title: The probability of a US-Iran diplomatic meeting before April 30th is currently 52% on Polymarket, a recent increase of 6%.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, data from Polymarket shows that the predicted probability of a diplomatic meeting between the US and Iran before April 30th is currently 52%, a recent increase of 6%. New Delhi Television reported that sources say the second round of talks between Iran and the US is scheduled for April 27th. According to market rules, if US and Iranian representatives hold a formal diplomatic meeting before 11:59 PM ET on April 30th, the market will mark it as "yes." A diplomatic meeting is defined as a formal meeting where representatives of both sides are officially present and authorized, including indirect face-to-face meetings through mediators, but excluding brief greetings or chance encounters for non-diplomatic purposes. The meeting must be in person and recognized by the government or reported by credible media. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing them in.

data.title: Iran-U.S. Second Round of Talks Scheduled for April 27
data.description: According to Odaily, New Delhi Television reports that sources have indicated the second round of negotiations between Iran and the United States is set for April 27.

data.title: NBA Playoffs: Thunder vs. Suns Game 3 Preview
data.description:
The NBA playoffs Western Conference first-round Game 3 between the Oklahoma City Thunder and the Phoenix Suns is set to begin tomorrow at 3:30 AM UTC+8. According to Odaily, a user with a 49% win rate recently placed a $172,000 bet on the Thunder defeating the Suns, with an opening price of 78¢.

The Thunder have established a 2-0 series lead over the Suns, leveraging their team rotation defense and transition play. However, the team faces a significant challenge due to injuries. Forward Jalen Williams has suffered a grade one strain in his left hamstring and will miss both Game 3 and Game 4, impacting the team's wing defense and rotation depth.

data.title: An account with a 49% win rate was purchased for $172,000. The Thunder defeated the Suns in Game 3 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket prediction event for "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 3 Thunder vs. Suns," an account with a 49% win rate (address: 0x6ac5bb06a9eb05641fd5e82640268b92f3ab4b6e) purchased $172,000 worth of bets on the Thunder defeating the Suns two hours ago, at an opening price of 78¢. Game 3 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs between the Thunder and the Suns will tip off at 3:30 AM Beijing time tomorrow. The Thunder, with their excellent team rotation defense and transition offense, have steadily dominated the Suns in the first two games, establishing a 2-0 series lead. However, the team is currently suffering a critical injury blow: their core forward, Jalen Williams, has suffered a Grade 1 left hamstring strain and is confirmed to miss Games 3 and 4 of this series, significantly weakening their wing play and rotation depth. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before prices are set.

data.title: Aave Proposes ETH Release to Arbitrum DAO Following rsETH Incident
data.description: Aave, along with other stakeholders, has put forward a proposal to the Arbitrum DAO to release Ethereum (ETH) that was frozen following the rsETH incident on April 18. According to NS3.AI, the proposal aims to inject these funds into DeFi United, with the goal of restoring rsETH collateral assets and compensating users for their losses. The decision now rests with the Arbitrum DAO, which will determine whether to approve the release of the frozen ETH.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Departs Islamabad After Meeting Pakistani Officials
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has concluded his visit to Islamabad following discussions with Pakistani officials. According to Odaily, the meeting aimed to strengthen diplomatic relations between the two countries. Araghchi's departure marks the end of his official engagements in Pakistan.

data.title: Iranian media: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi has left Islamabad after meeting with Pakistani officials.
data.description: According to Iranian media reports, Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi has left Islamabad after meeting with Pakistani officials. (Jinshi)

data.title: Aave submitted a governance proposal to the Arbitrum DAO requesting the release of frozen ETH for injection into DeFi United.
data.description: Aave announced on the X platform that its service providers, along with stakeholders including Ether_fi, KelpDAO, LayerZero_Core, and compound_xyz, have submitted a governance proposal to the Arbitrum DAO, requesting the release of ETH previously frozen by the Arbitrum Security Committee due to the rsETH incident on April 18th. If the proposal is approved, funds will be injected into DeFi United to restore rsETH collateral and mitigate user losses. The proposal is currently open for review and feedback is being sought from the Arbitrum community.

data.title: Binance to Adjust Tick Size for USDⓈ-M Perpetual Futures Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the exchange will implement changes to the tick size of several USDⓈ-M Perpetual Futures Contracts to enhance market liquidity and improve trading experiences. These adjustments are scheduled to occur on specific dates and times, affecting various trading pairs.

The tick size, which represents the minimum change in unit price, will be modified for the following contracts: RAVEUSDT and TRADOORUSDT on 2026-04-27 at 06:30 (UTC) and 06:40 (UTC) respectively, 1000SATSUSDT and DOGSUSDT on 2026-04-27 at 06:40 (UTC) and 06:50 (UTC), and CRVUSDT, GALAUSDT, CTSIUSDT, and ICXUSDT on 2026-04-29 at 06:30 (UTC), 06:40 (UTC), 06:50 (UTC), and 07:00 (UTC) respectively. The adjustments will not impact the overall trading operations of these contracts, except for the specified USDⓈ-M Perpetual Futures Contracts.

During the adjustment period, trading functions for the affected contracts will be temporarily suspended. For instance, the USDⓈ-M 1000SATSUSDT Perpetual Futures Contract will be unavailable from 2026-04-27 06:40 (UTC) to 06:41 (UTC), and similar suspensions will occur for DOGSUSDT, CRVUSDT, GALAUSDT, CTSIUSDT, and ICXUSDT at their respective times. Users will be unable to place new orders or modify existing ones during these brief suspensions. The status of these contracts will change from “TRADING” to “PENDING_TRADING.”

API users are advised to check the latest status and tick size changes via the GET /fapi/v1/exchangeInfo endpoint. The tick size update will not affect existing orders, as they will continue to be matched with the original tick size. Traders are encouraged to review the Trading Parameters and adjust their strategies accordingly to mitigate any potential impact.

data.title: Oil Demand Faces Potential Reduction Amid Hormuz Strait Disruptions
data.description:
The ongoing disruptions in the Hormuz Strait have not yet led to a collapse in oil demand, as wealthy nations are utilizing reserves and paying high prices to secure supply. According to Odaily, traders are now warning of an imminent significant reduction in demand. They indicate that the longer the Hormuz Strait remains closed, the more consumption will need to be adjusted downward to align with a supply decrease of at least 10%. Achieving this will require reduced purchasing, either due to unaffordable prices or through government intervention to curb consumption.

Saad Rahim, Chief Economist at Trafigura Group, noted that demand destruction is occurring in less visible pricing centers. This reduction is already underway, but if the situation persists, the scale of demand reduction will only increase. The market is at a critical turning point.

data.title: KBC Expands Crypto Trading for Retail Investors
data.description: KBC has introduced regulated Bitcoin and Ethereum trading for retail investors via its Bolero brokerage platform earlier this year. According to NS3.AI, this move aligns with the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation, which established a unified framework for crypto services across the European Union. Other financial institutions, including BBVA, DZ Bank, and Societe Generale Forge, are also enhancing their digital asset capabilities within their existing banking infrastructures.

data.title: Economists: The shock from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is about to crush demand.
data.description: The oil shock from the Strait of Hormuz has not yet caused a demand collapse because wealthy countries are using their inventories and securing supplies at high prices. But traders are now warning of a severe demand contraction. Traders say the longer the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, the more consumption will need to adjust downwards to match at least a 10% drop in supply. To achieve this, people will have to reduce their purchases, either through unaffordable prices or through government intervention to suppress consumption. Trafigura Group chief economist Saad Rahim said demand destruction is happening in those intangible pricing centers. This contraction is already underway, but if it continues, the scale of the demand contraction will only grow larger. We are at a critical turning point. (Jinshi)

data.title: CFTC Challenges New York's Application of Gambling Laws to Prediction Markets
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has initiated legal action against New York, aiming to prevent the state from enforcing gambling laws on federally registered prediction market exchanges. According to NS3.AI, New York is the fourth state involved in the CFTC's ongoing legal battle. The complaint filed by the CFTC seeks a declaratory judgment on federal preemption and requests a permanent injunction to halt state actions. Additionally, the agency has submitted an amicus brief in Massachusetts, where courts are deliberating whether federal derivatives law supersedes state gambling regulations.

data.title: AI Agents Require Native Payment Systems, Says Jesse Pollak
data.description: Jesse Pollak emphasized the necessity for AI agents to have native, programmable payment systems. According to NS3.AI, approximately $48 million has been processed through the x402 protocol. Pollak noted that around 95% of x402 transactions have taken place on Base, highlighting the protocol's capability to support on-demand API payments without the need for traditional subscriptions.

data.title: The CFTC sued New York State to block its application of betting laws to prediction markets.
data.description: The CFTC has filed a lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York, seeking to block New York State's enforcement of its betting laws against federally regulated prediction market platforms. The CFTC argues that federal law grants it sole regulatory authority over such markets and is seeking a permanent injunction against New York State's enforcement actions. CFTC Chairman Michael Selig stated that registered exchanges face multiple state-level lawsuits that undermine the CFTC's sole regulatory authority over prediction markets. Previously, New York State sued Binance and Gemini, alleging their products violated state betting rules and had requested Kalshi to cease certain sports-related contracts. Currently, 37 states and the District of Columbia have filed legal opinions supporting Massachusetts's enforcement of Kalshi's laws, arguing that federal law does not legalize sports betting and has not repealed the states' historical regulatory authority.

data.title: Jesse Pollak: AI agents are the next wave in crypto payments
data.description: In an interview, Jesse Pollak, head of the Base chain, stated that AI agents are rapidly gaining autonomy and increasingly require native, programmable payment systems. Currently, approximately $48 million in payments have flowed through the x402 protocol, with about 95% of these transactions occurring on the Base network. Pollak pointed out that the x402 open-source payment protocol, developed by Coinbase in collaboration with Microsoft, Google, and Mastercard, enables on-demand API payments without the need for traditional subscription systems. This crypto infrastructure allows AI agents to move funds instantly and at low cost globally for services such as data access, computing, or travel bookings. Its long-term vision is to create an open marketplace of services that enables software to discover and purchase digital services in real time without human intervention.
